channel.title: hw on Morgoth
channel.description: Recent content in hw on Morgoth

item.title: Hardware
item.description: Hardware https://github.com/micropython/micropython https://github.com/tinygo-org/tinygo SoC SOC：（System-On-Chip)片上系统。可以简单的理解为把系统做在一块芯片上。 AP: application processor, CPU, GPU, NPU, ISP, DSP, ROM/RAM. BP: base-band processor, BBU. EUV: Extreme Ultraviolet Lithog
